postToolUse.name: TypeScript Type Check
postToolUse.description: Run tsc --noEmit after editing .ts files to catch type errors early

postToolUse.name: ESLint Format Check
postToolUse.description: Run ESLint on edited .ts files to maintain consistent code style

preToolUse.name: Block Lock File Edits
preToolUse.description: Prevent accidental edits to build/lock files
preToolUse.message: ⚠️ 禁止编辑构建产物或缓存文件（library/、temp/、build/、node_modules/）。请在 src/ 或 assets/ 中修改源码。
